name: Hot Buttered Rum
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, stir together the brown sugar, butter or margarine, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Stir in the warm water.
3. Micro-cook uncovered on 100% power for 3 to 4 minutes or until steaming hot.
4. Stir in the rum.
5. Serve in mugs. Garnish with lemon slices if desired.
